understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate from the starting position to the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level. The objective is to complete levels efficiently by using horizontal moves, gravity falls, and click interactions with breakable blocks, while avoiding spike hazards and managing turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is purely horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the player vertically in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid tile or hit a hazard. CLICK can remove breakable blocks at specified coordinates to open fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spike tiles (u/v) are instant-death on contact. Safe tiles include o, m, w. Each level has 2 attempts of 50 turns. Corridor scans show landing positions for each column, and passages indicate gravity drops to new sections. Moving platforms, when present, count down moves until kill only on horizontal moves, not clicks.
